audit_items.proof_trace: The formula on L793-795 computes priceMultiplier = S - floor((S-E)*t/D) using Solady mulDiv (floor division). Since elapsedTime is clamped to [0,auctionDuration] at L785 and _applyAssetParamsUpdates enforces S >= E at L653, we have floor((S-E)*t/D) <= S-E, so priceMultiplier >= E for all t in [0,D]. Floor rounding strengthens the lower bound rather than violating it.
